note: Finished. Added optional relevance_scores: Dict[str,float] param to NDCG.compute(), used via a get_relevance() helper for both the DCG loop (over retrieved_ids) and the IDCG loop (now built from sorted ideal_relevances instead of assuming rel=True). I kept ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) unchanged since your fix to that line is your task, not mine, and my sandbox appears isolated from yours (working tree was clean before I started, no trace of your edit). All 7 existing NDCG tests still pass. patch.txt written with only this change.
